name: useOptimistic
description: Hook that allows get optimistic value before its update
examples: const [optimisticValue, updateOptimistic] = useOptimistic<number>(count, (currentState, optimisticValue) => currentState + optimisticValue);

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: The value to be returned initially and whenever no action is pending

source.source: * @param {State} state The value to be returned initially and whenever no action is pending

tokens.name: state
tokens.description: The value to be returned initially and whenever no action is pending

parameters.name: update
parameters.description: A pure function that takes the current state and the optimistic value passed to updateOptimistic and returns the resulting optimistic state

source.source: * @param {(currentState: State, optimisticValue: State) => State} update A pure function that takes the current state and the optimistic value passed to updateOptimistic and returns the resulting optimistic state

tokens.name: update
tokens.description: A pure function that takes the current state and the optimistic value passed to updateOptimistic and returns the resulting optimistic state

returns.name: The
returns.description: resulting optimistic state, and the function to update it

source.source: * @returns {UseOptimisticReturn<State>} The resulting optimistic state, and the function to update it
